goal: Close out Day-0 Bootstrap readiness before starting M1-001 API bootstrap.
head: f0e4583
blocked_scope: development documentation changes outside docs/CONTEXT.md and docs/WORKING.md
product source changes before Day-0 readiness decision
immediate stage, commit, or push before verified phase closeout
script changes other than bootstrap verifier repair
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: User requested final program development per docs and v6 FE mockup. First aligned step is Day-0 Bootstrap readiness verification before M1-001. Scope allows WORKING/task contract updates, verifier artifacts, and bootstrap verifier repair only; product code remains blocked until readiness is decided. Existing uncommitted .codex/ setup files are included so the stop hook can account for prior user-approved work.
required_commands: rg -n "phase_status: day0_readiness_complete|status: day0_readiness_complete|Day-0 Bootstrap readiness verification passed" docs/WORKING.md
executed_verification_commands: rg -n "phase_status: day0_readiness_complete|status: day0_readiness_complete|Day-0 Bootstrap readiness verification passed" docs/WORKING.md

phase_notes.plan: Audit Day-0 Bootstrap readiness using IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE section 4 before starting M1-001.
phase_notes.audit: Read current CONTEXT/WORKING, SSOT Phase 1/M1 rows, M1 handoff, and Day-0/M1 IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE sections; product code remains blocked until readiness is decided.
phase_notes.build: Updated WORKING and task contract for Day-0 readiness audit; repairing bootstrap verifier to use Python sqlite3 instead of requiring system sqlite3 CLI.
phase_notes.check: Scaffold verifier passed in verify-only mode with .venv Python; toolchain mismatches are recorded non-strictly in artifacts/review/toolchain_report.json.
phase_notes.done: Day-0 readiness is complete enough to close this prep phase and open a scoped M1-001 API bootstrap task next.

pabcd.approved_scope: Audit Day-0 Bootstrap readiness and update handoff/task contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product source, tests, specs, foundation docs, mockups, reviews, handoffs, runtime state activation, or immediate git stage/commit/push before verification closeout.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: After verification passes at phase completion, stage explicit files, commit, and push.
